blueprint_book.label: 14_abucnasty
blueprint_book.description:
place down each stage in order from 1 to 4. The display panels will tell you what to do. You have to check the chest to be "filled" yourself, otherwise the guide is self explanatory.

The startup circuits you can delete at your own leisure after the display panel tells you its okay to delete it.

- designed by abucnasty
